results.summary: Retail sentiment on $IREN is broadly bullish, driven by Anthropic partnership speculation, a Jefferies Buy initiation, and a persistent narrative that the market is mispricing the company as a Bitcoin miner rather than an AI infrastructure platform. The key bearish risk is that rival TeraWulf has already secured an Anthropic lease generating ~$19B in contracted revenue, raising concerns that IREN may be left without a comparable deal and the 'no revenue' criticism could weigh on sentiment if no partnership materializes within the reported 6-week decision window.

results.name: Tesla
keyThemes: Robotaxi expansion into Miami as bullish catalyst
Price target upgrades and momentum watchlists
BYD competition and single-model revenue concentration bear thesis
Technical levels reclaimed (50 & 200 DMA)
High valuation concern vs. peers (300+ P/E)
results.topBullish: $TSLA Tesla up 1.14% in pre-market after launching its unsupervised robotaxi service in Miami on July 3. It's the first robotaxi market outside Texas and California. Coverage zone spans 10-14 square miles in western Miami-Dade, versus Waymo's 60 square miles in the same city.
results.topBearish: @mrfundman @ogre_codes @BowieHole Big problem for Tesla is that it has just ONE model that generates most of its revenue and that model pales in reliability, resale value and tech to Toyota $TM RAV4. Meanwhile BYD $BYDDY is crushing $TSLA while also supplying Tesla batteries for EVs and energy solutions!
results.summary: Social sentiment around TSLA skews moderately bullish, driven by the landmark robotaxi launch in Miami, reclaimed key technical levels, and widespread inclusion in momentum/speculative watchlists with price targets ranging up to $800. The primary bear thesis centers on a concentrated revenue model vulnerable to BYD competition and a stretched valuation exceeding 300x earnings, though these concerns are significantly outnumbered by bullish posts.
